variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket consists only of direct production/inventory rows ('Raw materials and consumables' and 'semi-finished goods and finished goods'). The excerpt shows no explicit COGS-specific D&A row. The visible D&A rows appear as separate operating-expense lines at a broader overhead level, not clearly tied to COGS. Conservative no-add choice avoids misclassifying overhead D&A as COGS_DA.

candidates.row_label: Personnel costs Depreciation/amortisation of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Mixed personnel-plus-D&A row was explicitly excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS earlier because it combines categories; using it here would overstate D&A and risk double counting personnel.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation of tangible and intangible assets

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation/amortisation of tangible and intangible assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is 'Other external costs' plus 'Other operating expenses'. The statement presents 'Depreciation/amortisation of tangible and intangible assets' as a separate operating line alongside those rows, indicating it sits outside the selected XSGA components and should be added separately later. Summary row chosen instead of component depreciation/amortisation lines.
